# Configuration Reference

Config file: `~/.grove/config.toml`

Generated by `g init`. All sections and keys are optional — if the file doesn't exist,
code-level defaults apply. Run `g init` to generate a commented starter file.

---

## Minimum Viable Config (serve agent)

The minimum meaningful config for a grove agent running `g serve`:

```toml
[defaults]
agent = "oak"

[heartbeat]
enabled = true
auto_update = true

[serve]
port = 8014
```

Everything else inherits defaults.

---

## Full Config Reference

```toml
# ~/.grove/config.toml
# Generated by `g init` — all values are optional

[user]
name = "Josh"               # Your name (injected into session context)
timezone = "America/Chicago"

[defaults]
agent = "oak"               # Active agent when GROVE_AGENT env var is not set
world = ""                  # World/namespace prefix for multi-user deployments (rarely needed)

# ── Embedding ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

[embedding]
provider = "docker"         # docker | external | none
model = "bge-base-en"       # Model name passed to embedding API
# dims = 768                # Embedding vector dimensions (auto-detected from model; set if model disagrees)

[embedding.docker]
url = "http://localhost:8766"  # Local embedding service (docker compose up)

[embedding.external]
# url = "https://api.openai.com/v1"
# api_key_env = "OPENAI_API_KEY"    # Env var name (never hardcode keys)
# model = "text-embedding-3-small"

# For Ollama (OpenAI-compat mode):
# url = "http://localhost:11434/v1"
# api_key_env = ""
# model = "nomic-embed-text"

# ── Serve ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

[serve]
# port = 8014               # HTTP port for g serve (no default — must be set to use g serve)
# host = "0.0.0.0"          # Bind address (override with GROVE_SERVE_HOST)

# ── Heartbeat ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

[heartbeat]
enabled = false             # Enable automatic scheduled heartbeat
interval = "30m"            # Duration string: "30m", "1h", "2h30m"
provider = "auto"           # auto | anthropic | external
model = "auto"              # LLM model name, or "auto" to pick default per provider
external_url = ""           # OpenAI-compatible endpoint (required when provider = "external")
collect_git = true          # Include git log/diff in collection phase
collect_sessions = true     # Include Claude Code session logs in collection phase
context_compress_threshold = 1500  # Auto-compress CONTEXT.md when estimated tokens exceed this; 0 = disabled
# external_api_key = ""     # API key for external heartbeat endpoint (env var name or literal)
auto_update = false         # Check for grove upgrades hourly; install + restart if behind

# ── Index ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

[index]
chunk_words = 300           # Target words per chunk
chunk_overlap = 60          # Overlap words between adjacent chunks
chunk_markdown_aware = true # Split on ## / ### headers before word-windowing

# ── Search ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

[search]
query_expansion = false     # Generate alt query phrasing via LLM before searching
expansion_model = "auto"    # "auto" uses heartbeat.model and heartbeat.external_url
# expansion_url = ""        # Override endpoint for query expansion (defaults to heartbeat.external_url)
recency_decay_lambda = 0.005  # Exponential decay factor for time-weighting search results; 0 = disabled

# ── Context ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

[context]
max_tokens = 2000           # Max characters of search results injected at session start
# index_threshold = 0.0     # Min relevance score to include in context injection (0 = include all)

# ── Git ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

[git]
auto_commit = false         # git add + commit data/ after each heartbeat
auto_push = false           # git push after commit (requires remote configured)

# ── Hook ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

[hook]
prompt_submit_threshold = 0.08   # Min FTS5 score to inject into prompt context; 0 = always inject top results
prompt_submit_limit = 3          # Max search results to inject per user prompt

# ── Update ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

[update]
source = ""                 # Git URL or local path — set by `g init` from dist-info
installer = "uv"            # uv | pip

# ── Backends ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

[backends.claude_code]
# additional_session_dirs = []  # Extra dirs to scan for Claude Code session JSONL logs

# ── Ollama ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

[ollama]
# url = "http://localhost:11434"  # Ollama base URL (used when provider = "external" + Ollama model)
```

---

## Config Sections

### `[user]`

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | string | `""` | Your name, injected into session context |
| `timezone` | string | `"UTC"` | Your timezone (e.g., `"America/Chicago"`) |

### `[defaults]`

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `agent` | string | `"oak"` | Default active agent when `GROVE_AGENT` env var is not set |
| `world` | string | `""` | World/namespace prefix for multi-user deployments (leave blank) |

### `[serve]`

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `port` | int | — | HTTP port for `g serve`. No default — must be set. Overridden by `GROVE_SERVE_PORT`. |
| `host` | string | `"0.0.0.0"` | Bind address. Overridden by `GROVE_SERVE_HOST`. |

> `[serve]` has no DEFAULT_CONFIG entry — values are read directly from config or env vars.
> Each agent on a machine must use a unique port.

### `[embedding]`

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `provider` | string | `"docker"` | `docker` \| `external` \| `none` |
| `model` | string | `"bge-base-en"` | Embedding model name |
| `dims` | int | auto | Embedding vector dimensions. Auto-detected from model; set only if your model differs from the default. |

**provider = "docker"** — runs local `bge-base-en` via Docker on port 8766. Zero cost, no API key.
Run `docker compose up -d embeddings` before `g serve`.

**provider = "external"** — any OpenAI-compatible embedding endpoint (OpenAI, Ollama, vLLM, etc.).

**provider = "none"** — keyword-only search. No vectors, no Docker required. Fastest setup, weakest retrieval.

### `[embedding.docker]`

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `url` | string | `"http://localhost:8766"` | Embedding service URL |

### `[embedding.external]`

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `url` | string | — | OpenAI-compatible embeddings endpoint |
| `api_key_env` | string | — | Env var name containing API key (not the key itself) |
| `model` | string | — | Model name to request |

### `[heartbeat]`

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `enabled` | bool | `false` | Enable automatic heartbeat on schedule |
| `interval` | string | `"30m"` | How often to run (`"30m"`, `"1h"`, `"2h"`) |
| `provider` | string | `"auto"` | `auto` \| `anthropic` \| `external` |
| `model` | string | `"auto"` | LLM model name, or `"auto"` to pick default per provider |
| `external_url` | string | `""` | OpenAI-compatible chat endpoint (required when `provider = "external"`) |
| `collect_git` | bool | `true` | Include git log/diff in Phase 1 collection |
| `collect_sessions` | bool | `true` | Include Claude Code session logs in Phase 1 collection |
| `context_compress_threshold` | int | `1500` | Auto-compress CONTEXT.md when estimated token count exceeds this. Set `0` to disable. |
| `external_api_key` | string | `""` | API key for external heartbeat endpoint. Set to an env var name (e.g. `"OPENAI_API_KEY"`) or a literal key. |
| `auto_update` | bool | `false` | Check for grove upgrades hourly. If behind, runs `install_cmd` + restart. See ADR-0061. |

**provider = "auto"** — uses `external` if `external_url` is set, otherwise falls back to `anthropic`.

**provider = "external"** — any OpenAI-compatible `/chat/completions` endpoint. Works with vLLM,
Ollama, LM Studio, llama.cpp, homelab-ai. Set `external_url` and `model` explicitly.

**provider = "anthropic"** — Anthropic Messages API. `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` must be in env.
`model = "auto"` resolves to `claude-haiku-4-5-20251001`.

**auto_update** — when `true`, the serve scheduler registers an hourly job that:
1. Derives the Gitea tags API URL from the grove dist-info `direct_url.json`
2. Compares the latest tag against the running `grove.__version__`
3. If behind, POSTs to `http://127.0.0.1:{port}/v1/agent/upgrade`

Requires `[update].source` to be set (done by `g init`). Override the check URL with
`GROVE_UPGRADE_CHECK_URL` env var. No-op if URL can't be derived.

### `[index]`

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `chunk_words` | int | `300` | Target words per chunk |
| `chunk_overlap` | int | `60` | Overlap words between adjacent chunks (20%) |
| `chunk_markdown_aware` | bool | `true` | Split on `##`/`###` headers before word-windowing |

**Tuning:** 300/60 targets the useful embedding range for BGE-base-en (~225 tokens). Smaller chunks
= more precise retrieval but less context per result. Set `chunk_markdown_aware = false` for pure
word-window behavior.

### `[search]`

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `query_expansion` | bool | `false` | Generate one alt phrasing via LLM before searching |
| `expansion_model` | string | `"auto"` | `"auto"` uses `heartbeat.model` and `heartbeat.external_url` |
| `expansion_url` | string | — | Override endpoint for query expansion (defaults to `heartbeat.external_url`) |
| `recency_decay_lambda` | float | `0.005` | Exponential decay factor for time-weighting search results. Higher = more recency bias. `0` = disabled. |

**query_expansion:** Bridges vocabulary mismatch (e.g., searching "login" when content says
"authentication"). Adds ~1-2s latency. Silent no-op if LLM endpoint is unavailable.

### `[context]`

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `max_tokens` | int | `2000` | Max characters from search results injected at session start |
| `index_threshold` | float | `0.0` | Min relevance score to include in context injection. `0` = include all top results. |

### `[git]`

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `auto_commit` | bool | `false` | `git add -A && git commit` in `data/` after each heartbeat |
| `auto_push` | bool | `false` | `git push` after commit (requires remote configured) |

> Only enable `auto_push` if the agent has git credentials configured. grove does not manage
> git credentials.

### `[hook]`

Controls memory injection at prompt-submit time (the `prompt-submit` hook).

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `prompt_submit_threshold` | float | `0.08` | Min FTS5 relevance score to inject a result. `0` = always inject top results regardless of score. |
| `prompt_submit_limit` | int | `3` | Max search results to inject per user prompt |

**Tuning:** Higher threshold = only high-confidence matches get injected. Lower threshold or `0`
= inject more broadly. `prompt_submit_limit` is a hard cap regardless of threshold.

### `[update]`

Controls `g update` and the `auto_update` self-upgrade mechanism.

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `source` | string | `""` | Git URL or local path used by `g update` and `auto_update`. Set by `g init` from dist-info. |
| `installer` | string | `"uv"` | `uv` \| `pip` — package manager for upgrades |

> `source` is automatically populated from `direct_url.json` in dist-info when you run `g init`.
> For Gitea installs: `git+ssh://git@gitea.server.unarmedpuppy.com/josh/innie-engine.git@main`

### `[backends.claude_code]`

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `additional_session_dirs` | list[string] | `[]` | Extra directories to scan for Claude Code session JSONL logs |

### `[ollama]`

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `url` | string | — | Ollama base URL. Used when `embedding.provider = "external"` with an Ollama model. |

---

## Homelab Examples

### Minimal — server agent (elm)

```toml
[defaults]
agent = "elm"

[user]
name = "Josh"
timezone = "America/Chicago"

[heartbeat]
enabled = true
auto_update = true
provider = "external"
model = "qwen3-32b"
external_url = "http://homelab-ai-api.server.unarmedpuppy.com/v1"

[serve]
port = 8018

[update]
source = "git+ssh://git@gitea.server.unarmedpuppy.com/josh/innie-engine.git@main"
installer = "uv"
```

### Full — Mac Mini agent (oak)

```toml
[user]
name = "Josh"
timezone = "America/Chicago"

[defaults]
agent = "oak"

[embedding]
provider = "docker"
model = "bge-base-en"

[heartbeat]
enabled = true
interval = "30m"
provider = "external"
model = "claude-sonnet-4-6"
external_url = "https://homelab-ai-api.server.unarmedpuppy.com/v1"
collect_git = true
collect_sessions = true
context_compress_threshold = 1500
auto_update = true

[serve]
port = 8014

[search]
query_expansion = false
recency_decay_lambda = 0.005

[hook]
prompt_submit_threshold = 0.08
prompt_submit_limit = 3

[git]
auto_commit = false
auto_push = false

[update]
source = "git+ssh://git@gitea.server.unarmedpuppy.com/josh/innie-engine.git@main"
installer = "uv"
```

---

## Multiple Agents, Single Config

All agents on a machine share one `config.toml`. Agent-specific behavior is controlled by:

1. `GROVE_AGENT` env var (or `defaults.agent` in config) — selects the active agent
2. Per-agent `SOUL.md` — identity and persona
3. Per-agent `HEARTBEAT.md` — extraction instructions
4. Per-command `--agent` flag

The `[serve]` port must be configured per-agent. Use env var `GROVE_SERVE_PORT` or a
per-agent launch config (plist `EnvironmentVariables` / systemd `Environment=`) to
differentiate when multiple agents share a config.toml.

---

## Dot-Notation Access

Config values can be read in code with dot notation:

```python
from grove.core.config import get

provider = get("embedding.provider", "docker")
model = get("heartbeat.model", "auto")
auto_update = get("heartbeat.auto_update", False)
port = get("serve.port", 8014)
```
